summary: Web Admin Panel (React+Vite) comprehensive testing - ALL TESTS PASSED (100%). Tested: Login page, admin authentication, Dashboard stats, Locations table, Categories list, Business Accounts, Notifications page, and full sidebar navigation.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Login page: Professional form with email pre-filled (admin@gradacac.ba), password field, 'Prijavi se' button on dark gradient background
✓ Authentication: POST /api/auth/login with role check (admin only), JWT token stored in localStorage
✓ Dashboard: All 5 stat cards showing: 16 locations, 6 categories, 4 business accounts, 4 active devices. Secondary stats: 1 premium location, 44 total views. Recent notifications list visible.

✓ Locations page (/api/admin-panel/locations): Table with all 16 locations. Columns: NAZIV (with category badge), KATEGORIJA (colored badges), ADRESA, OCJENA (star rating), SLIKE (image count), AKCIJE (edit/delete)

✓ Categories page (/api/admin-panel/categories): All 6 categories listed with color circle indicators: Restorani (#FF6B6B), Marketi (#4ECDC4), Auto Servisi (#45B7D1), Kafići (#96CEB4), Ljekarne (#FFEAA7), Benzinske (#DDA0DD)
✓ Business Accounts (/api/admin-panel/business-accounts): Shows 4 accounts with name, email, linked location and creation date

✓ Notifications (/api/admin-panel/notifications): Send form with title/message inputs and 'Pošalji svima' button. Stats card showing 4 active devices. Notification history table with 15 total notifications.
✓ All sidebar navigation working: Dashboard, Lokacije, Kategorije, Događaji, Atrakcije, Biznis Nalozi, Obavještenja, Postavke
✓ Admin info shown in sidebar footer: 'Admin / admin@gradacac.ba' with logout button
✓ Page served at /api/admin-panel/ (HTTP 200) with correct React+Vite bundle
Note: Business Accounts list contains some TEST_ accounts from previous automated testing - not a bug, just test data residue
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Used existing data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel fully functional at https://gradacac-map.preview.emergentagent.com/api/admin-panel/. Credentials: admin@gradacac.ba / Gradacac2024!. All pages working: Dashboard (stats cards), Locations (16 records table), Categories (6 with color indicators), Business Accounts (4 accounts), Notifications (send form + history), plus Događaji, Atrakcije, Postavke pages also accessible via sidebar navigation.

login_page.status: ✓ PASS - Professional login form with Gradačac Mapa branding
